site.title: Brand Identity | Pantalytics
site.description: Official brand identity and style guide for Pantalytics. Logo, colors, typography and tone of voice guidelines.
overview.title: Brand Identity — Pantalytics
overview.intro: This brand guide defines how Pantalytics presents itself visually and verbally. It is the single source of truth for logo usage, colors, typography and tone of voice.
overview.mission.title: Mission
overview.mission: Bring order to your business processes with secure, open source software.
overview.values.title: Brand values
overview.value.reliable.desc: European, GDPR-compliant, secure. We choose open source and avoid vendor lock-in.
overview.value.open.desc: Open source, transparent, no hidden costs or dependencies.
overview.value.practical.desc: Business-first, no-nonsense, results-driven. We solve real problems.
overview.value.smart.desc: AI-powered, data-informed, efficient. We automate what can be automated.
overview.audience.title: Who is this guide for?
overview.audience: Employees, partners, designers and agencies communicating on behalf of Pantalytics. Use these guidelines for presentations, websites, social media and all other communications.
overview.opensource.title: Open source
overview.opensource: This brand guide is open source. The code is MIT-licensed, the brand assets are CC BY-ND 4.0.
logo.title: Logo — Pantalytics
logo.intro: The Pantalytics logo is our primary identifier. Use it consistently and in accordance with the guidelines below.
logo.placeholder: The high-resolution logo is currently being finalized. The version shown below is a placeholder.
logo.variants.title: Logo variants
logo.variants.desc: The logo is shown on different backgrounds to demonstrate correct usage.
logo.clearspace.title: Clear space
logo.clearspace: Maintain a minimum clear space equal to the height of the 'P' icon around the logo. This ensures the logo always has sufficient breathing room.
logo.minsize.title: Minimum size
logo.minsize: Do not use the logo smaller than 120px wide for digital applications or 30mm for print.
logo.dos.title: Do
logo.dos.1: Use the logo on approved backgrounds
logo.donts.title: Don't
logo.donts.4: Place the logo on busy backgrounds
colors.title: Colors — Pantalytics
colors.intro: The Pantalytics color palette is built around a dark, professional base with a recognizable purple accent. Use these colors consistently across all communications.
colors.primary.title: Primary colors
colors.neutral.title: Text & background
colors.border.title: Borders
colors.contrast.title: WCAG Contrast ratios
colors.contrast.desc: The table below shows contrast ratios for commonly used combinations. Ensure text always meets the WCAG AA standard.
colors.guidelines.title: Usage guidelines
colors.guideline.1: Never use accent purple (#9b99ff) as body text on a white background — the contrast is insufficient (3.02:1).
colors.guideline.2: The accent color is intended for interactive elements, eyebrows and decorative highlights.
colors.guideline.3: Dark teal backgrounds are the primary brand environment.
colors.guideline.4: White sections are used sparingly for emphasis and contrast.
typography.title: Typography — Pantalytics
typography.intro: Pantalytics uses two carefully chosen typefaces: Lexend for headings and Instrument Sans for body text. Both are self-hosted for GDPR compliance.
typography.heading.title: Lexend — Headings
typography.heading.desc: Lexend is used for all headings (h1–h6), logo text and statistics. Weight 500 (Medium) only.
typography.body.title: Instrument Sans — Body
typography.body.desc: Instrument Sans is used for body text, navigation, buttons and captions. Weights 400 (Regular), 500 (Medium) and 700 (Bold).
typography.scale.title: Type scale
typography.scale.desc: The type scale is based on a modular ratio and adapts across different screen sizes.
typography.rules.title: Rules
typography.rule.1: Headings are always Lexend 500 — never use bold (700) for headings.
typography.rule.2: Body text uses Instrument Sans 400 by default, 500 for medium emphasis (buttons, navigation), 700 for strong emphasis.
typography.rule.3: Eyebrow text (h6) is always uppercase with 0.1em letter-spacing in the accent color.
typography.rule.4: Do not use any other typefaces in Pantalytics materials.
typography.rule.5: For documents without self-hosted fonts (email, plain documents): use the system sans-serif stack as fallback.
typography.body.sample: We help companies streamline their processes with reliable, open source software. From CRM to invoicing, from inventory to project management — everything in one platform.
voice.title: Tone of Voice — Pantalytics
voice.intro: How Pantalytics communicates is just as important as how we look. Our voice is professional, clear and human.
voice.personality.title: Brand personality
voice.personality.professional.desc: We communicate clearly and directly. No jargon, no hype.
voice.personality.practical.desc: We focus on concrete outcomes, not abstract promises.
voice.personality.human.desc: We speak as entrepreneurs to entrepreneurs. First person plural ('we'), direct address ('you').
voice.personality.honest.desc: We give honest advice, even if it means recommending something else.
voice.attributes.title: Voice attributes
voice.dos.title: Writing guidelines
voice.do.1: Use active voice: 'We implement Odoo' not 'Odoo is implemented by us'.
voice.do.2: Be specific: '20-40% less effort' not 'significantly better results'.
voice.do.4: Lead with the customer benefit, not the technical feature.
voice.do.5: Keep sentences short. One idea per sentence.
voice.donts.title: Avoid
voice.dont.4: Overly formal language when a simple word works.
voice.dont.5: Unnecessary capitalization (e.g., 'Smart Business Software' only in titles).
voice.examples.title: Examples
voice.example.before.label: Don't
voice.example.after.label: Do
voice.example.1.before: Our state-of-the-art solutions facilitate your digital transformation.
voice.example.1.after: We help you streamline business processes with open source software.
voice.example.2.before: Our cutting-edge AI platform leverages synergies to drive digital transformation.
voice.example.2.after: Our AI reads Odoo source code, maps your data automatically, and tests continuously. You go live faster.
downloads.title: Downloads — Pantalytics
downloads.intro: Download the official Pantalytics brand assets. Use these files for presentations, partnerships and publications.
downloads.logo.title: Logo
downloads.logo.desc: Pantalytics logo in PNG format. SVG version currently unavailable.
downloads.colors.title: Color palette
downloads.colors.desc: CSS file with all Pantalytics colors as custom properties.
downloads.fonts.title: Fonts
downloads.fonts.desc: Lexend and Instrument Sans in woff2 format. Licensed under SIL Open Font License.
downloads.pdf.title: Brand Guide PDF
downloads.pdf.desc: Complete brand guide as PDF document.
